title: Healthera - Patient Engagement Platform for Pharmacies
problem: Pharmacies struggle to engage patients beyond dispensing. Medication adherence is poor and follow-up is limited.
solution: Patient engagement platform for pharmacies enabling medication reminders, repeat prescription ordering, and health tracking through a patient app.
technology: Mobile app, pharmacy system integration, notifications
varden_fit: Low — pharmacy-focused, not clinic infrastructure. Different channel.
notes: Pharmacy patient engagement. Adjacent to Varden's clinic focus.
